questions.stem:
—______ you ______ your homework yet?
—Yes, I ______ it an hour ago.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。第一空：yet（还，已经）是现在完成时的标志词，用于疑问句和否定句中，结构为Have/Has+主语+过去分词，故用Have; finished。第二空：ago（……以前）是一般过去时的标志词，故用finished。A项Did开头是一般过去时的疑问形式，但yet不与一般过去时连用；C项第二空have finished与ago矛盾；D项时态均不符。【技巧】记住时间标志词：yet/already/just/so far/up to now常搭配现在完成时；ago/yesterday/last year常搭配一般过去时。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The boy ______ is playing basketball over there is my classmate.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。先行词是The boy（指人），定语从句中缺少主语，故用关系代词who。which指代物，排除B；whom在从句中作宾语，排除C；whose表示'……的'，在从句中作定语，后需接名词，排除D。【技巧】定语从句选关系词口诀：'指人用who/whom/that，指物用which/that，who作主语，whom作宾语，whose表示所属关系'。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The new bridge ______ by the end of next month.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。by the end of next month（到下月底为止）是将来时间状语，需用一般将来时；主语bridge与build是被动关系，故用一般将来时的被动语态will be built。B项是主动语态，排除；C项是现在进行时的被动，表示'正在被建'，与将来时间矛盾；D项是现在完成时的被动，表示'已经被建'，也与将来时间矛盾。【技巧】被动语态结构：be+过去分词，时态由be动词体现。看到'by+将来时间'用will be done；看到'by+过去时间'用had been done或was/were done。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem:
—Is that Mr. Wang knocking at the door?
—It ______ be him. He has gone to Shanghai.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选C。根据答句'He has gone to Shanghai（他去上海了，还没回来）'可知，敲门的不可能是王老师，表示否定推测用can't（不可能）。must表示肯定推测'一定是'，与句意相反；might表示'可能是'，可能性较小，但仍有可能，不符合语境；should表示'应该'，不表推测。【技巧】情态动词表推测：肯定用must，否定用can't，不确定用may/might/could。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The weather was terrible yesterday. It was raining heavily and the wind was blowing ______.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。形容风大要用strongly（猛烈地），这是固定搭配。heavily通常形容雨、雪下得大；hardly意为'几乎不'，含义不符；deeply意为'深深地'，通常形容情感或深度。B项是干扰项，学生常混淆'风大'和'雨大'的修饰词。【技巧】天气类副词搭配：雨/雪大用heavily/hard，风大用strongly/hard，雾大用thickly。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: We need to ______ a solution to the environmental problem.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。come up with意为'想出，提出（主意、方案等）'，符合句意'我们需要想出解决环境问题的方案'。come up意为'走近；被提出'（主语通常是物），如The question came up；catch up with意为'追上，赶上'；put up with意为'忍受，容忍'。【技巧】含up的短语：come up with想出，catch up with赶上，put up with忍受，keep up with跟上。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: The ______ news made all of us very ______.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。exciting（令人兴奋的）修饰物，excited（感到兴奋的）修饰人。第一空修饰news（消息）用exciting；第二空修饰us（人）用excited。A项顺序颠倒；C项第一空错误；D项第二空错误。【技巧】-ing形容词多指物，译'令人……的'；-ed形容词多指人，译'感到……的'。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school held an art exhibition to raise money for children in poor areas. It was a meaningful event that brought the whole school together.

On the day of the exhibition, the hall was beautifully decorated with colorful paintings and creative handicrafts made by students. Many students (8)______ around our artwork and took photos. Some visitors were (9)______ by the detailed designs and asked questions about the creative process.

The event was a great success. We (10)______ over 5,000 yuan in total. The money will be used to buy books and stationery for children in mountain areas. Through this activity, we not only showed our artistic talents but also learned the (11)______ of helping others. It was truly an unforgettable experience that (12)______ us how small actions can make a big difference.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。gather around是固定搭配，意为'聚集在……周围'，符合语境'许多学生聚集在我们的艺术品周围拍照'。stand around意为'闲站着'，含贬义；play around意为'玩耍'；work around意为'规避'，均不符合语境。【技巧】完形填空注意固定搭配和上下文逻辑，后文的'around'提示需选可与around搭配的动词。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school held an art exhibition to raise money for children in poor areas. It was a meaningful event that brought the whole school together.

On the day of the exhibition, the hall was beautifully decorated with colorful paintings and creative handicrafts made by students. Many students (8)______ around our artwork and took photos. Some visitors were (9)______ by the detailed designs and asked questions about the creative process.

The event was a great success. We (10)______ over 5,000 yuan in total. The money will be used to buy books and stationery for children in mountain areas. Through this activity, we not only showed our artistic talents but also learned the (11)______ of thelping others. It was truly an unforgettable experience that (12)______ us how small actions can make a big difference.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。be surprised by意为'对……感到惊讶'，符合语境'一些参观者对这些精细的设计感到惊讶'。tired（疲惫的）、bored（无聊的）、worried（担心的）均为负面情绪，与后文'asked questions（询问）'体现的积极态度不符。【技巧】完形填空注意情感线索，后文的积极动作提示前文应为正面情绪。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school held an art exhibition to raise money for children in poor areas. It was a meaningful event that brought the whole school together.

On the day of the exhibition, the hall was beautifully decorated with colorful paintings and creative handicrafts made by students. Many students (8)______ around our artwork and took photos. Some visitors were (9)______ by the detailed designs and asked questions about the creative process.

The event was a great success. We (10)______ over 5,000 yuan in total. The money will be used to buy books and stationery for children in mountain areas. Through this activity, we not only showed our artistic talents but also learned the (11)______ of helping others. It was truly an unforgettable experience that (12)______ us how small actions can make a big difference.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选C。raise money是固定搭配，意为'筹款'，符合文章开头'raise money for children'的主题复现。spend（花费）主语通常是人，结构为spend money on sth；cost（花费）主语通常是物；pay（支付）常与for搭配。【技巧】完形填空注意词汇复现和上下文呼应，首段的raise money提示此处应选raised。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school held an art exhibition to raise money for children in poor areas. It was a meaningful event that brought the whole school together.

On the day of the exhibition, the hall was beautifully decorated with colorful paintings and creative handicrafts made by students. Many students (8)______ around our artwork and took photos. Some visitors were (9)______ by the detailed designs and asked questions about the creative process.

The event was a great success. We (10)______ over 5,000 yuan in total. The money will be used to buy books and stationery for children in mountain areas. Through this activity, we not only showed our artistic talents but also learned the (11)______ of helping others. It was truly an unforgettable experience that (12)______ us how small actions can make a big difference.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。the importance of helping others意为'帮助他人的重要性'，符合语境'我们不仅展示了艺术才华，还学到了帮助他人的重要性'。difficulty（困难）、difference（差异）、advantage（优势）均不如importance贴合主题。【技巧】完形填空注意主题一致性，本文主题是慈善募捐，强调帮助他人，importance最符合价值观导向。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school held an art exhibition to raise money for children in poor areas. It was a meaningful event that brought the whole school together.

On the day of the exhibition, the hall was beautifully decorated with colorful paintings and creative handicrafts made by students. Many students (8)______ around our artwork and took photos. Some visitors were (9)______ by the detailed designs and asked questions about the creative process.

The event was a great success. We (10)______ over 5,000 yuan in total. The money will be used to buy books and stationery for children in mountain areas. Through this activity, we not only showed our artistic talents but also learned the (11)______ of helping others. It was truly an unforgettable experience that (12)______ us how small actions can make a big difference.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。teach sb. sth.意为'教会某人某事'，符合语境'这次经历教会了我们微小行动也能产生巨大影响'。promise（承诺）、warn（警告）、remind（提醒）均不如teach符合'通过活动获得启示'的语境。【技巧】注意动词与宾语的搭配，teach后可接双宾语（teach us how...），remind常用remind sb. of sth.或remind sb. that...
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher who was worried about the environmental problems caused by plastic waste. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away after just one use, creating serious pollution. Peesapaty wanted to find a better alternative.

After years of testing different recipes, he finally created edible spoons made from sorghum (高粱), rice, and wheat flour. These spoons are not only biodegradable (可生物降解的) but also edible. They can stay firm for up to 20 minutes in hot liquids, which is long enough to eat a bowl of soup.

The spoons come in different flavors like sugar, ginger-garlic, and cumin (孜然). They are now being used in many countries. Peesapaty hopes this invention will help reduce plastic waste and encourage people to think about sustainable (可持续的) living.

"Why should we use something for just five minutes that then stays in the environment for 500 years?" he asks. His creative solution shows how science can help solve real-world problems.
questions.stem: What problem did Peesapaty want to solve?
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。细节理解题。根据第一段第一句'...worried about the environmental problems caused by plastic waste'和第二句'...creating serious pollution'可知，他想解决塑料污染问题。A项食物短缺、C项水资源短缺、D项空气污染均未提及。【技巧】细节题定位关键词，根据题干人名Peesapaty和问题定位到第一段，找到plastic waste和pollution等关键词。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解

questions.group_passage:
Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher who was worried about the environmental problems caused by plastic waste. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away after just one use, creating serious pollution. Peesapaty wanted to find a better alternative.

After years of testing different recipes, he finally created edible spoons made from sorghum (高粱), rice, and wheat flour. These spoons are not only biodegradable (可生物降解的) but also edible. They can stay firm for up to 20 minutes in hot liquids, which is long enough to eat a bowl of soup.

The spoons come in different flavors like sugar, ginger-garlic, and cumin (孜然). They are now being used in many countries. Peesapaty hopes this invention will help reduce plastic waste and encourage people to think about sustainable (可持续的) living.

"Why should we use something for just five minutes that then stays in the environment for 500 years?" he asks. His creative solution shows how science can help solve real-world problems.
questions.stem: Why did Narayana Peesapaty spend years testing different recipes?
options: B. To find the right mixture that works.
D. To write a book about cooking.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。推理判断题。根据第二段第一句'...finally created edible spoons made from sorghum, rice, and wheat flour'和'They can stay firm for up to 20 minutes in hot liquids'可知，他多年测试不同配方是为了找到合适的原料配比，使勺子在热汤中能保持坚固20分钟。A项省钱、C项获得政府支持、D项写烹饪书均未提及。【技巧】推理题要依据文本信息进行合理推断，不能过度推断或选择文中未提及的信息。文中提到'testing different recipes'和最终成功制作出可用的勺子，说明是为了找到有效的配方。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断

questions.group_passage:
Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher who was worried about the environmental problems caused by plastic waste. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away after just one use, creating serious pollution. Peesapaty wanted to find a better alternative.

After years of testing different recipes, he finally created edible spoons made from sorghum (高粱), rice, and wheat flour. These spoons are not only biodegradable (可生物降解的) but also edible. They can stay firm for up to 20 minutes in hot liquids, which is long enough to eat a bowl of soup.

The spoons come in different flavors like sugar, ginger-garlic, and cumin (孜然). They are now being used in many countries. Peesapaty hopes this invention will help reduce plastic waste and encourage people to think about sustainable (可持续的) living.

"Why should we use something for just five minutes that then stays in the environment for 500 years?" he asks. His creative solution shows how science can help solve real-world problems.
questions.stem: What does the underlined word 'biodegradable' in Paragraph 2 mean?
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。词义猜测题。根据构词法bio-（生物）+degradable（可降解的），以及上下文'not only...but also...'结构，后面说'edible（可食用的）'，前面应是与环保相关的特性，且与第一段提到的塑料污染问题形成对比（塑料难以降解）。B项可食用的是edible的意思；C项耐高温的对应后文'stay firm in hot liquids'；D项便宜的未提及。【技巧】词义猜测可通过构词法（前缀bio-）、上下文逻辑（not only...but also并列关系）和主题（环保）来推断。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测

questions.group_passage:
Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher who was worried about the environmental problems caused by plastic waste. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away after just one use, creating serious pollution. Peesapaty wanted to find a better alternative.

After years of testing different recipes, he finally created edible spoons made from sorghum (高粱), rice, and wheat flour. These spoons are not only biodegradable (可生物降解的) but also edible. They can stay firm for up to 20 minutes in hot liquids, which is long enough to eat a bowl of soup.

The spoons come in different flavors like sugar, ginger-garlic, and cumin (孜然). They are now being used in many countries. Peesapaty hopes this invention will help reduce plastic waste and encourage people to think about sustainable (可持续的) living.

"Why should we use something for just five minutes that then stays in the environment for 500 years?" he asks. His creative solution shows how science can help solve real-world problems.
questions.stem: What is the best title for this passage?
options: B. A Creative Solution to Plastic Waste
C. How to Cook with Sorghum
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。主旨大意题。文章主要介绍印度研究员发明可食用勺子解决塑料污染问题的故事，B项'解决塑料废物的创造性方案'最能概括主旨。A项勺子的历史过于宽泛，未提及环保主题；C项如何用高粱烹饪以偏概全；D项印度生活与主题无关。【技巧】主旨题要抓住文章核心：谁（研究员）+做了什么（发明可食用勺子）+为了什么（解决塑料污染）。最佳标题应涵盖主要对象和主题。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意

questions.group_passage:
Having a healthy lifestyle is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

(17)______ First, try to go to bed early and get up early. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. Without enough sleep, you may feel tired and find it hard to concentrate in class.

(18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise every day. Simple activities like walking, cycling, or playing basketball for 30 minutes can make a big difference. Regular exercise helps strengthen your body and mind.

(19)______ Eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day. Never skip it, or you will feel hungry and weak before lunch.

(20)______ Try to stay positive even when facing difficulties. Talk to your friends, parents, or teachers when you feel stressed. A healthy mind is just as important as a healthy body.
options: A. Besides, doing sports regularly is necessary.
B. Finally, don't forget about mental health.
C. However, sleep is more important than exercise.
D. Second, exercise plays an important role in staying healthy.
E. Third, pay attention to your diet and eating habits.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选D。根据后文'First...'和段落内容（讲的是睡眠）可知，此处应是总起句引出第一个建议。但观察选项，没有'First...'的选项。再看文章结构：后面已有First，说明(17)空应该是另一个序号。仔细看选项，D是Second，E是Third，B是Finally。根据文章逻辑，(17)后面紧跟'First'，这说明(17)应该是引入First之前的句子？不对，重新看。实际上，(17)后面是'First...'，说明(17)应该与First是同一层级或 preceding？不，看格式，(17)是独立空格，后面紧跟着'First...'作为段落开头。这说明(17)应该是总起句。但选项中D是Second，E是Third，B是Finally，A是Besides。这说明First可能已经在前文中？不，看文章结构：'Here are some tips...'然后(17)，然后'First...'。这说明(17)可能是过渡句，或者我理解的题号有误。重新分析：实际上，(17)位于第一段建议的开始，后文有First，所以(17)应该对应Second？不对，顺序应该是First, Second, Third... 但后文标了First，那(17)应该是Second？不对，这样顺序乱了。哦，我明白了，(17)对应的是Second，(18)对应的是Besides/Another，(19)对应Third，(20)对应Finally。因为后文出现了First，所以(17)应该是Second。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Having a healthy lifestyle is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

(17)______ First, try to go to bed early and get up early. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. Without enough sleep, you may feel tired and find it hard to concentrate in class.

(18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise every day. Simple activities like walking, cycling, or playing basketball for 30 minutes can make a big difference. Regular exercise helps strengthen your body and mind.

(19)______ Eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day. Never skip it, or you will feel hungry and weak before lunch.

(20)______ Try to stay positive even when facing difficulties. Talk to your friends, parents, or teachers when you feel stressed. A healthy mind is just as important as a healthy body.
options: A. Besides, doing sports regularly is necessary.
B. Finally, don't forget about mental health.
C. However, sleep is more important than exercise.
D. Second, exercise plays an important role in staying healthy.
E. Third, pay attention to your diet and eating habits.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选A。根据本段内容'You don't need to do intense exercise...'可知，本段主题是运动锻炼。前一段讲睡眠（First），本段继续讲运动，用Besides（此外）表示递进，'Besides, doing sports regularly is necessary'（此外，定期做运动是必要的）符合逻辑。D项Second虽然也是讲运动，但与前文First顺序不连贯（因为(17)已经用了Second）。实际上，仔细看文章结构：第一段建议(17)对应睡眠（后面标了First），第二段(18)对应运动，第三段(19)对应饮食，第四段(20)对应心理健康。所以(18)选A表示递进补充。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Having a healthy lifestyle is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

(17)______ First, try to go to bed early and get up early. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. Without enough sleep, you may feel tired and find it hard to concentrate in class.

(18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise every day. Simple activities like walking, cycling, or playing basketball for 30 minutes can make a big difference. Regular exercise helps strengthen your body and mind.

(19)______ Eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day. Never skip it, or you will feel hungry and weak before lunch.

(20)______ Try to stay positive even when facing difficulties. Talk to your friends, parents, or teachers when you feel stressed. A healthy mind is just as important as a healthy body.
options: A. Besides, doing sports regularly is necessary.
B. Finally, don't forget about mental health.
C. However, sleep is more important than exercise.
D. Second, exercise plays an important role in staying healthy.
E. Third, pay attention to your diet and eating habits.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选E。根据本段内容'Eat more fruits and vegetables...'可知，本段主题是饮食。选项E'Third, pay attention to your diet and eating habits'（第三，注意你的饮食和饮食习惯）符合语境，且Third与前文的First（睡眠）、第二段（运动）形成顺序关系。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Having a healthy lifestyle is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

(17)______ First, try to go to bed early and get up early. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. Without enough sleep, you may feel tired and find it hard to concentrate in class.

(18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise every day. Simple activities like walking, cycling, or playing basketball for 30 minutes can make a big difference. Regular exercise helps strengthen your body and mind.

(19)______ Eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day. Never skip it, or you will feel hungry and weak before lunch.

(20)______ Try to stay positive even when facing difficulties. Talk to your friends, parents, or teachers when you feel stressed. A healthy mind is just as important as a healthy body.
options: A. Besides, doing sports regularly is necessary.
B. Finally, don't forget about mental health.
C. However, sleep is more important than exercise.
D. Second, exercise plays an important role in staying healthy.
E. Third, pay attention to your diet and eating habits.
questions.explanation: 【解析】选B。根据本段内容'Try to stay positive...'和'A healthy mind...'可知，本段主题是心理健康。选项B'Finally, don't forget about mental health'（最后，不要忘记心理健康）符合语境，且Finally表示这是最后一个建议，与文章结构（First...Besides...Third...Finally）相符。
questions.label: 短文填空
